description: Manual Figma component/token → Montage Swift mapping. Convention-based matching is the fallback; entries here override. Add an entry whenever a Figma path is NOT a clean Type/Variant/Size match — e.g. when a Figma variant has been promoted to a separate Montage component, or when the Figma name uses words that don't match any enum case.

Card/List.notes: Figma 'Card/List' is a separate Montage component (ListCard, horizontal layout) — NOT a variant of the vertical Card. Use ListCard fluent modifiers (.caption, .extraCaption, .leadingContent, .trailingContent, .topContent, .bottomContent) for the visible labels.
